actions: added check, smoke, and retrieval CLI commands
updated truthful UI status without enabling UI execution

validation.command: python -m pytest tests/test_campaign_stage_gate_policy.py tests/test_plan_sequence_lock.py tests/test_goal_drift_guard.py tests/test_test_governance_manifest.py -q

pitfall_review.new_pitfall: A broad patch context in the repeated external project registry initially attached AnySearch evidence to the preceding LLM Wiki v2 entry.
pitfall_review.global_pitfall_log_reason: The current project AGENTS boundary prohibits editing Workspace global control documents without separate confirmation.
pitfall_review.prevention_rule: Registry edits must anchor on project_id and tests must guard against cross-project evidence contamination.

remaining_gap: The adapter is real, but its UI, Core Bridge, real proxy path, service terms review, and later product campaigns remain incomplete.
